title: NoShieldSlot
description: Removes the shield slot from the client-side on Modern Minecraft.
body:
## NoShieldSlot
This mod fully removes the shield slot (off-hand slot) from the client side, offering options to:
- Visually & functionally remove slot from Inventory
- Disable offhand keybind

This is mainly useful for servers utilizing [ViaVersion](https://modrinth.com/plugin/viaversion), or other similar multi-version setups, where the slot goes unutilized.

## Inventory with Hide Slot enabled
![Inventory with Hide Slot enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01a6e1baed49ae7f89891fa8d8c5b43c23744d80.png)

## Texture Override
The mod provides a default `inventory.png` that will be displayed when Hide Slot is enabled, as the texture cannot be scissored in real time. **This asset can be overriden at the following path in any resourcepack**:
```
no-shield-slot/textures/gui/container/inventory.png
```
##### (Example - [jani270/Skyblock-Dark-UI](https://github.com/jani270/Skyblock-Dark-UI/tree/master/assets/no-shield-slot/textures/gui/container))
